query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spark_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  type ENUM('spark_of_knowing', 'house_activation') NOT NULL,
  recipient_id INT NOT NULL,
  house_id INT,
  granted_by INT NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  activated_at DATETIME,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  INDEX idx_recipient (recipient_id),
  INDEX idx_type (type)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spark_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  type ENUM('spark_of_knowing', 'house_activation') NOT NULL,
  recipient_id INT NOT NULL,
  house_id INT,
  granted_by INT NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  activated_at DATETIME,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  INDEX idx_recipient (recipient_id),
  INDEX idx_type (type)
);
